title: Mirro column automation
excerpt:
Hi community…!! 
I need some clarification on mirrored column …!! 
Can we change the status of a mirrored column on the trigger of an status changed on an status column in a board?

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community…!!

I need some clarification on mirrored column …!!

Can we change the status of a mirrored column on the trigger of an status changed on an status column in a board?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@aquibk

Currently, mirror columns CAN be used in the TRIGGER portions of automations. However, they are not yet available to be used in the ACTION portion of automations. If this is a critical need for your use case, there are other options including Integromat or General Caster (on the paid plan).

Jim - The Monday Man

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @aquibk

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as solved.
This means that the thread will close in 7 days time

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
